SELECT MAX("Percent (%) Eligible Free (K-12)") AS Highest_Eligible_Free_Rate FROM frpm WHERE "County Name" = 'Alameda'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT 1	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT s."Zip"  FROM frpm f  JOIN schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode  WHERE f."Charter School (Y/N)" = 1 AND f."County Name" = 'Fresno County Office of Education'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT s."MailStreet", s."MailCity", s."MailState", s."MailZip"  FROM frpm f  JOIN schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode  ORDER BY f."FRPM Count (K-12)" DESC  LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT s.Phone  FROM frpm f  JOIN schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode  WHERE f."Charter School (Y/N)" = 1  AND s.OpenDate > '2000-01-01'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT COUNT(*)  FROM satscores ss  JOIN schools s ON ss.cds = s.CDSCode  WHERE ss.AvgScrMath > 400 AND s.Virtual = 'F'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT s.School, s.City, s.State  FROM schools s  JOIN satscores ss ON s.CDSCode = ss.cds  WHERE ss.NumTstTakr > 500 AND s.Magnet = 1	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT s.Phone  FROM satscores ss  JOIN schools s ON ss.cds = s.CDSCode  WHERE ss.NumGE1500 > 0  ORDER BY ss.NumTstTakr DESC  LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT SUM(NumTstTakr) AS total_test_takers FROM satscores ss JOIN frpm f ON ss.cds = f.CDSCode WHERE f."FRPM Count (K-12)" = 4419.0	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT s.CDSCode)  FROM satscores ss  JOIN schools s ON ss.cds = s.CDSCode  WHERE ss.AvgScrMath > 560 AND s.FundingType = 'Charter'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT f."FRPM Count (Ages 5-17)"  FROM satscores s  JOIN frpm f ON s.cds = f.CDSCode  ORDER BY s.AvgScrRead DESC  LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT CDSCode FROM frpm WHERE "Enrollment (K-12)" + "Enrollment (Ages 5-17)" > 500	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT MAX(("Free Meal Count (Ages 5-17)" / "Enrollment (Ages 5-17)")) AS Highest_Eligible_Free_Rate FROM satscores ss JOIN frpm f ON ss.cds = f.CDSCode WHERE (ss.NumGE1500 * 1.0 / ss.NumTstTakr) > 0.3	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT s.Phone FROM satscores ss JOIN schools s ON ss.cds = s.CDSCode ORDER BY (ss.NumGE1500 * 1.0 / ss.NumTstTakr) DESC LIMIT 3	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT NCESSchool FROM schools WHERE CDSCode IN (SELECT CDSCode FROM frpm) LIMIT 5	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT f."District Name", AVG(s.AvgScrRead) AS AvgReadingScore  FROM satscores s  JOIN frpm f ON s.cds = f.CDSCode  GROUP BY f."District Name"  ORDER BY AvgReadingScore DESC  LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT COUNT(*)  FROM satscores s  JOIN schools sch ON s.cds = sch.CDSCode  WHERE sch.County = 'Alameda' AND s.NumTstTakr < 100	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT s."CharterNum", ss.AvgScrWrite  FROM satscores ss  JOIN schools s ON ss.cds = s.CDSCode  WHERE ss.AvgScrWrite > 499 AND s."CharterNum" IS NOT NULL  ORDER BY ss.AvgScrWrite DESC	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT * FROM schools s JOIN satscores ss ON s.CDSCode = ss.cds WHERE s.County = 'Fresno' AND s.FundingType = 'Directly Funded' AND ss.NumTstTakr <= 250	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT s.Phone FROM satscores ss JOIN schools s ON ss.cds = s.CDSCode ORDER BY ss.AvgScrMath DESC LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	california_schools
